title: MYTHOPIA
description: The offical Modpack of the Mythopia-Network which improves the overall-performance while adding nice QoL-Features
body:
# **Features**:
- much performance improvements compared to Vanilla
- Ingame VoiceChat on the SMP
- Iris Shaders with the most features OptiFine offers
- uses the Fabric Loader (most Launchers work with Fabric)
- adds a couple of nice Extra Features for the needs on our Network

**Imortant Note**: If you aren't 100% sure if this Modpack is bannable on the Server you play on, don't play with this Modpack. Because the Modpack is made to fit our needs in our Network.
